title: Why is my gantt chart grey? How can I add color?
excerpt:
I searched for this so long, but found no answer! Almost 4 hours now. 
I AM GOING CRAZY! 
Please help me. 
How do I colorize my tasks? They are grey currently. And why is one red? Because it’s critical I guess, but can I…

posts.author: Zanarkand (Wladislaw Reiswich)
posts.cookedHtml:
I searched for this so long, but found no answer! Almost 4 hours now.
I AM GOING CRAZY!
Please help me.

How do I colorize my tasks? They are grey currently. And why is one red? Because it’s critical I guess, but can I make it another color?

Thanks!

11845×851 154 KB

And if I want to edit my tasks, can I do that in the gantt chart too, or do I always have to navigate to the main view?

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml: Same problem here. Even if i choose a status column the chart and the legend remain gray

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
My use/experience with gantt is limited.

It looks like you’re showing the “Critical Path”, which I don’t believe you can customize the coloring. You will need to decide whether showing critical path or different colors is more important. Same applies to the Baselines setting.

If you turn it off/hide in the settings, you will be able to change the “Color by” settings based on what you need/want. Keep in mind the color customization is still limited depending on what setting you use (ie: Group matches the group color you can set, but Board and some others are generated at random and can’t be changed or customized)

As for editing, you can click and drag to change the date. If you need to do more detailed changes, hover over the item in the left pane and click the dropdown arrow > Edit Item

@davide.monticelli See above. I’m thinking you’re in the same boat as OP

posts.author: Zanarkand (Wladislaw Reiswich)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much! It was the critical path and baseline which had to be disabled to see the colors!

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s works for me too!!! thank you very much!
